TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Victor_Alexander, title = Victor_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Victor_Alexander} }

S.FORM: Victor Alexander siwkay niza nalecuhan niza i 8 a bulad 31 a demiad, 1969 a mihca, Victor Alexander, u miunduay a kawaw niza. Victor Alexander nalecuhan i Detroit, Michigan. Victor Alexander unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay, u tebanay mimaliay. Victor Alexander i 1991 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 17, namapili' tu nu Golden State Warriors putiput. kakuniza nu kawaw
S.PHON: *i ¶tor ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr siwkaj niza nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan niza i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, *i ¶tor ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr, u miunduaj a kawaw niza. *i ¶tor ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i d…ôtroit, mi ¶ƒßigan. *i ¶tor ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~…æiaj, u tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj, u t…ôbanaj mimar~…æiaj. *i ¶tor ar~…æ…ô*and…ôr i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu gor~…æd…ôn stat…ô warriors putiput. kakuniza nu kawaw
S.FORM: Victor Alexander siwkay niza nalecuhan niza i 8 a bulad 31 a demiad, 1969 a mihca, Victor Alexander, u miunduay a kawaw niza. Victor Alexander nalecuhan i Detroit, Michigan. Victor Alexander unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay, u tebanay mimaliay. Victor Alexander i 1991 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 17, namapili' tu nu Golden State Warriors putiput. kakuniza nu kawaw
